name: Spectrum Gusto Lick Snack For Dog With Turkey Duck And Spinach 4x15g
description: Spectrum Gusto Lick Snack Turkey & Duck & Spinach is a smooth, creamy lickable dog treat made with a flavorful blend of poultry and vegetables, designed to deliver a delicious reward in a light, easy-to-serve format. Its soft texture makes it ideal for spoon-feeding in small portions, helping create positive bonding moments during daily routines. Prepared with real turkey (4%) and duck (4%) , this lick snack provides quality animal protein, while spinach (4%) adds natural plant-based nutrients. The high moisture content supports hydration, and the low-fat formulation makes it suitable for regular treating when fed responsibly. Sunflower oil enhances palatability, while a carefully selected flavor enhancer made from chicken liver and heart digest boosts aroma and acceptance. Spectrum Gusto Lick Snack Turkey & Duck & Spinach is perfect as a dessert, reward, or enrichment treat alongside a complete and balanced diet. Ingredients Water Chicken Tapioca starch Turkey (4%) Duck (4%) Spinach (4%) Sunflower oil Flavour enhancer (chicken liver & heart digest, pea protein, salt) Nutritional Composition Crude Protein: — % Crude Fat: 1.5% Crude Ash: 0.5% Crude Fibre: 0.1% Feeding Recommendations & Warnings Treat calories should not exceed 10% of a dog’s total daily caloric intake Serve as a reward, dessert, or everyday treat Always provide fresh drinking water Not suitable for human consumption
